subtitle: A 2-kilometre crescent of pale sand on the west coast of Havelock Island that TIME named the best beach in Asia in 2004 — and where an American snorkeller was killed by a saltwater crocodile in April 2010.
spike_statement: TIME called Radhanagar the best beach in Asia in 2004; in 2010 a saltwater crocodile killed a snorkeller in the same water.
